author: @simjito
text: im gonna be real even if you say that youre 'not as valueble of a cc' thats fundamentally untrue you dont have to be the best most informed person to have value and if i did not find your channel i prolly wouldnt enjoy/be as good at the game because the community at large is really intimidating but your content and by extension your server let me actually interact with people in the community and pick up so many things and im gonna be so honest id rather watch someone like you over a super mega pro at the game who can 425 with a lobotomy and only sr wheels because youre far more relatable and chill this prolly makes no sense idk man youre fucking awesome and dont let yourself or anybody else tell you otherwise

text:
